alerts.title: Construction in the South End of the Park
alerts.description: Construction projects underway. Moose-Wilson Road open with delays of 45 minutes in both directions. Death Canyon Road and Trailhead closed. Taggart Trail detour in place. Menor's Ferry Road closed weekdays.

alerts.title: Measles outbreak in Teton County
alerts.description: The Teton County Health Department declared a local emergency due to a measles outbreak on July 13, 2026. Visitors and residents may have been exposed at several locations in Teton County, including the Colter Bay area in Grand Teton National Park.

alerts.title: Madison, Firehole, and Gibbon Rivers Closed to Fishing
alerts.description: The following rivers and their tributaries are closed to fishing due to warm water temperatures and low flows: Madison River, Firehole River, and Gibbon River.

alerts.title: Traffic Delays - Gibbon River Bridge
alerts.description: Expect up to 15-minute delays on Gibbon River Bridge from July 9 through late-July while crews repair the railing.

alerts.title: Biscuit Basin Closed Due to Hydrothermal Explosion
alerts.description: The parking lot, boardwalk, and Firehole River at Biscuit Basin, located north of Old Faithful, is closed to all travel until further notice due to the possibility of another event at the site of a hydrothermal explosion that occurred July 23, 2024.

alerts.title: Death Canyon Trailhead Construction Closure
alerts.description: Death Canyon Road and Trailhead are closed to all use. Start hikes at alternative trailheads such as Granite Canyon, LSR Preserve, and Taggart Lake.

alerts.title: Traffic Delays - Gardner River High Bridge
alerts.description: Expect a single lane of traffic with up to 15-minute delays, 24 hours a day, seven days a week, from April 1 through late October 2026. Oversized/overweight vehicles (8'6"+ wide, 75'+ long, 80,000 lbs+ gross vehicle weight) will not be able to cross the bridge during this time.

alerts.title: Vehicle Entrance Reservation Not Needed
alerts.description: Although an entrance pass is required to enter Yellowstone National Park, vehicle reservations are not needed. You are encouraged to purchase an entrance pass before arriving, but you may also purchase passes at any entrance station upon arrival.
